description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sword with a dramatically curved, single-edged blade. The blade is predominantly black with a striking red edge and jagged, flame-like serrations along its lower side, giving it an aggressive and ornamental appearance. The handle is wrapped in a white material, likely for grip, and features a gold pommel and a gold guard with an angular, stylized design. The sword's proportions suggest it is intended for two-handed use, with a long grip and a substantial blade. The overall aesthetic is bold and intimidating, suitable for display or as a prop in a dramatic urban or fantasy setting. No sheath or scabbard is visible, and the sword's construction appears to be primarily metal with decorative elements.
description: A large, curved black and red sword with a jagged blade, white-wrapped handle, and gold guard and pommel. The design is bold and ornamental, evoking a fantasy or dramatic style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved, jagged black and red blade, white-wrapped handle, and gold guard and pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rectangular cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same curved blade, jagged edge, and handle details visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the width of the blade and handle, with the red edge and gold pommel most prominent.
attribute_handle_design: straight, white-wrapped, cylindrical with gold pommel
attribute_ornamentation: red blade edge, jagged flame-like blade pattern, gold accents
